questions.question: How do I create an account?
questions.answer: Click on the 'Sign Up' button in the top right corner of the homepage. You can sign up using your email address or through your Google account for faster registration.

questions.question: Is it free to use the platform?
questions.answer: Yes, creating an account and browsing professionals is completely free. You only pay when you book services directly through the platform.

questions.question: How do I find a professional?
questions.answer: Use our search feature to browse by category, location, or service type. You can also filter by ratings, price range, and availability to find the perfect match.

questions.question: Can I use this platform for my business?
questions.answer: Absolutely! If you're a service provider, you can create a professional profile to showcase your services and attract new clients.

questions.question: How do I register on ProConnect?
questions.answer: You can register using your email or sign in with your Google account. Click on 'Sign Up' and fill in your details including first name, last name, and email.

questions.question: How do I update my profile picture?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click on the avatar/photo area to upload a new image. Your previous avatar versions are saved for reference.

questions.question: How do I verify my phone number?
questions.answer: Add your phone number in profile settings and request a verification code. Enter the code to mark your phone as verified.

questions.question: Why am I not receiving emails?
questions.answer: Check your email spam folder. Make sure your email is verified in account settings. Contact support if issues persist.

questions.question: How do I book a professional?
questions.answer: Navigate to the professional's profile and click 'Contact' or 'Book Now'. You can then send them a message or request to schedule a service.

questions.question: How do reviews work?
questions.answer: After completing a service, you can leave a review for the professional. Your honest feedback helps other customers make informed decisions.

questions.question: Can I negotiate pricing with professionals?
questions.answer: Yes, you can discuss pricing directly with professionals through our messaging system. Many professionals offer custom quotes for specific jobs.

questions.question: What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
questions.answer: Contact the professional first to discuss your concerns. If the issue isn't resolved, you can report it to our support team for assistance.

questions.question: How do I cancel a booking?
questions.answer: Go to your profile dashboard to manage your bookings. You can cancel or reschedule appointments directly from there, though please respect the professional's cancellation policy.

questions.question: How do I post a job?
questions.answer: Navigate to Jobs section and click 'Post a Job'. Fill in the job title, description, category, and location. Jobs can be set to open or closed status.

questions.question: How do I find professionals for a specific service?
questions.answer: Browse professionals by service category or search for specific skills. You can filter by location and view professional profiles.

questions.question: How do I leave a review for a professional?
questions.answer: After working with a professional, go to their profile and click 'Leave a Review'. Rate your experience from 1-5 stars and add comments.

questions.question: Can I change or delete my review?
questions.answer: Once submitted, reviews cannot be changed. You can delete your own review if needed. Each client-professional pair can only have one review.

questions.question: How do I become a verified professional?
questions.answer: Complete your profile with all required information, add your services, and submit verification documents. Our team will review your application within 2-3 business days.

questions.question: How much does it cost to list my services?
questions.answer: Listing your services is free! We only charge a small commission on completed bookings. There are no monthly fees or subscriptions.

questions.question: How do I manage my availability?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and update your availability calendar. You can set specific hours, block off dates, or enable instant booking for customers.

questions.question: Can I offer discounts to attract clients?
questions.answer: Yes! You can create special offers, first-time customer discounts, or package deals directly from your dashboard.

questions.question: How do I get paid?
questions.answer: Payments are processed securely through the platform after service completion. You can withdraw funds to your bank account or PayPal.

questions.question: How do I become a professional on the platform?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and enable 'Professional Account'. You'll need to complete your profile with services you offer and set your location.

questions.question: How do I add the services I offer?
questions.answer: As a professional, you can select service categories from the available list when editing your profile. These help clients find you for specific services.

questions.question: How do clients contact me?
questions.answer: Clients can view your profile and contact information. When they view your contact details, you'll see a record of who have viewed your info.

questions.question: How are professionals verified?
questions.answer: We verify identity documents, professional licenses, and conduct background checks. Look for the 'Verified' badge on profiles.

questions.question: Is my personal information safe?
questions.answer: We use industry-standard encryption to protect your data. Professionals only see your contact information after you initiate a conversation.

questions.question: What should I do if I feel unsafe?
questions.answer: If you ever feel threatened or uncomfortable, end communication immediately and report the user. We're committed to maintaining a safe community.

questions.question: Are payments secure?
questions.answer: Yes, all payments are processed through secure payment gateways. We never store your full payment details on our servers.

questions.question: What payment methods are accepted?
questions.answer: We accept major credit cards, debit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers depending on the professional's preferences.

questions.question: When am I charged?
questions.answer: Payment is processed after the service is completed and you've confirmed satisfaction. Some professionals may require a deposit upfront.

questions.question: How do refunds work?
questions.answer: Refund policies vary by professional. If you're entitled to a refund, it will be processed within 5-7 business days.

questions.question: Can I get a receipt for my payment?
questions.answer: Yes, all transactions generate a digital receipt that's sent to your email and available in your account dashboard.

questions.question: Why can't I log into my account?
questions.answer: Check that you're using the correct email and password. If you forgot your password, use the 'Forgot Password' link to reset it. Make sure caps lock isn't enabled.

questions.question: The app isn't loading properly
questions.answer: Try clearing your browser cache and cookies, then refresh the page. Ensure your browser is updated to the latest version.

questions.question: How do I update my profile photo?
questions.answer: Go to your profile settings and click on your current photo to upload a new one. Supported formats include JPG, PNG, and GIF.

questions.question: I'm not receiving email notifications
questions.answer: Check your spam folder and ensure notifications are enabled in your account settings. Add our email address to your contacts.

questions.question: What data do you collect?
questions.answer: We collect information you provide during registration, profile setup, and service usage. This includes name, contact details, and service history.

questions.question: How is my data used?
questions.answer: Your data helps us provide and improve our services, match you with appropriate professionals, and communicate important updates.

questions.question: Can I delete my account?
questions.answer: Yes, you can request account deletion from your settings. We'll remove your personal data within 30 days, except where required by law to retain certain information.

questions.question: Do you share my data with third parties?
questions.answer: We only share data with professionals you explicitly contact and service providers necessary for payment processing. We never sell your data to advertisers.

questions.question: How is my data protected?
questions.answer: We follow security best practices including encrypted storage and secure authentication. Your personal data is never shared without consent.

questions.question: How can I contact customer support?
questions.answer: Email us at support@contacthub.com or use the live chat feature on our website. We're available Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM.

questions.question: I have a suggestion - how can I share it?
questions.answer: We love hearing from our users! Send your suggestions to feedback@contacthub.com. Your input helps us improve the platform.

questions.question: I'm interested in a partnership - who do I contact?
questions.answer: For business partnerships, reach out to our partnerships team at partners@contacthub.com with details about your proposal.
